Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Kazakh National University, also referred to as KazNU, is one of the most exceptionally qualified and oldest universities situated in Kazakhstan. Founded in 1934, it is located in Almaty, the largest city in Kazakhstan.

# Kazakhstan

Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Kazakh National University, also referred to as KazNU, is one of the most exceptionally qualified and oldest universities situated in Kazakhstan. Founded in 1934, it is located in Almaty, the largest city in Kazakhstan. The university got its name from the famous philosopher Al-Farabi and is known for its quality education, state-of-the-art amenities, as well as its powerful research programs. KazNU provides a broad spectrum of programs in social sciences, humanities, engineering, medicine, and even science. Useful learning environment with more than 30,000 students, a great number of them coming from abroad, establishes hospitable and friendly atmosphere for all learners.

KazNU’s faculties are well known for their expertise, since millions scientific articles are published by alumni every year. The library is full of literature, which is supplemented by advanced laboratories, hostels, libraries, sport facilities and its KazNU well known for its financial aid opportunities. While not egregiously exorbitant, KazNU provides excellent education and socio-political awareness, as well as Kazakh culture. The “Golden” city of Almaty offers a colorful perception of student life to KazNU learners, where they can welcome actively participate in various extra-curricular activities, cultural and metropolitan events.

Why Choose Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan?

Consider the fact that selecting a university can greatly impact a person’s future. KazNU: Al-Farabi’s Kazakh National University is among the best universities offering higher education with its state-of-the-art infrastructure and international reputation at the most reasonable pricing. Below are reasons why student’s should consider KazNU as a superb option.

Excellent Quality of Education

This university has alien instructors as well as structured classes with up-to-date courses enabling students to receive formal education from one of the leading universities of Kazakhstan.

Low Cost Tuition

Considering the higher learning institutions in Europe and North America, KazNU offers an internationally competitive tuition fee together with quality education which makes it most suitable for expats.

University’s Recognition

Graduates from this university can work in other countries including India after receiving a degree from KazNU because the university is accepted by WHO, MCI/NMC, and other foreign educational institutions.

Modernized Facilities

Supportive libraries, comfortable hostels, sports facilities, and research centers are available at KazNU, and the university also has technologically advanced laboratories which make it possible for students to study and nurture their talents.

Thriving Student Engagement

Extracurricular sporting, cultural and student organizational activities are at the students’ disposal attending to the vibrant activities and events organized throughout the year making university life more entertaining.

Friendly and Secure Atmosphere

Beautiful and modern city of Almaty is home to the university’s campus which is extremely supportive and safe making it a welcoming environment for foreign students.

Innovation and Research

KazNU has a reputation as a leading research university in the country and is one of the few institutions where faculty and students conduct advanced research in medicine, engineering, and the social sciences.

Job Perspectives

Alumni from KazNU enjoy a competitive edge in the job market since the majority of them find employment in reputable organizations such as Google, Microsoft, and IBM.

Al Farabi Kazakh National University offers the best combination of high academic standards, reasonable prices, and students’ amenities. KazNU’s strong reputation and lively campus atmosphere make it a perfect place for international students who seek a first-class education in a friendly atmosphere.

Eligibility Criteria To Study At Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

The following checklist must be completed by prospective students looing to join Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU) for MBBS program:

Education Requirement

The educational requirement is to pass 10+2 (Higher Secondary) or any higher education certificate from a recognized institution.

Students must have Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB) as main subjects.

General category students must attain 50 percent marks in PCB. (Reserved category students as per policy are allowed 40%).

NEET Qualification (For Indian Students)

Indian students must take the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) according to NMC (formerly MCI) requirements.

English Proficiency

Students must demonstrate working proficincy of English language as the course is taught in English.

Some students will need to take an English test such as IELTS or TOEFL, but this is not always the case.

Age Limit 

The cut off age is 17, which must be met by the enrolling student by 31st December of the year they wish to be accepted into.

The admissions process at KazNU is direct, with no extra or unnecessary steps which helps foreign students, particularly Indians seeking to pursue an MBBS in Kazakhstan, ease into the process.

Hostel Facilities At Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

North Kazakhstan State University (NKSU) has established hostels which are comfortable and inexpensive for international students. The hostels are situated near the campus, thus aiding the students’ ability to attend classes and utilize university facilities.

The hostel has the following amenities:

  • Eating facilities
  • Fitness gym
  • Television lounges
  • Mess hall
  • Common reading room
  • Computers for student use

These students have access to on-site amenities that facilitate a conducive living and studying environment.

Student life At Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Life as a student at Al Farabi Kazakh National University is bustling, multicultural and presents many opportunities to engage. The university has a large international student population which provides a friendly environment for students to enjoy their academics alongside extracurricular activities.

Diversity And Multiculturalism

KazNU has students from various countries, creating a diverse and inclusive atmosphere. This allows students to interact with different cultures and make lifelong friendships.

Hostel Amenities

For international students, KazNU offers well kept and budget friendly hostel accommodation. The hostels are equipped with the following facilities:

  • Reading rooms
  • Dining areas
  • Gym and fitness centers
  • TV lounges and entertainment areas
  • 24/7 security for student safety

Sports Facilities

KazNU strives to keep their students physically healthy and engaged, therefore wide range of sports is practiced at the institution. There is also:

A stadium, gymnasium, swimming pool, and other sports facilities.

Various sports teams and clubs that participate in different national and international competitions.

Social And Cultural Activities

The university allows students to take part in music, dance, drama, and cultural festivals. In addition, there are many other established student clubs and societies dedicated to other interests.

At KazNU, students are able to achieve the right balance between their education, extracurricular activities, and a nurturing environment, which makes their university experience enjoyable and unforgettable.

Ranking of Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Al-Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU) is one of the leading educational institutions in Kazakhstan and in the Central Asian region. Its rankings for 2024 is listed below:

National Ranking (Kazakhstan) In country rankings, KazNU is number two (2) in Kazakhstan which is indicative of it’s reputation and leadership in University education and research in the country.

Global Ranking In the worldwide ranking, KazNU is ranked 2202 according to UniRank. This reflects the growing recognition of the University in Central Asia and its presence in the world educational arena.

KazNU’s standings are a testament to its enrollment policies, quality education, research endeavors, and a multicultural academic environment that is well known around the globe.

Advantages of Studying At Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Al-Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU) is one of the leading universities in Kazakhstan, offering international students high quality education and a dynamic social environment.

Top-notch Academic Performance

Most universities adopt modern teaching methodologies in their pedagogy in order to meet international standards; this is especially true for KazNU, which has highly knowledgeable and skilled personnel to facilitate the students.

Competitive Prices

KazNU provides some of the most inexpensive tuition rates for foreigners in Kazakhstan. This makes it much more reasonable compared to universities in Europe and North America.

Worldwide Reputation

Does KazNU qualify? Yes, the University is recognized span-wise, and its diplomas are endorsed in numerous nations. Moreover, it features in major international rankings and receives accreditation from international bodies such as WHO and MCI.

Multicultural Network of Students

The University’s doors are open to students from all countries of the world. Students from different regions bring fresh ideas and new concepts to enrich their skills and competencies.

Great Opportunities for Research

KazNU is known internationally for its research activities, which include the development of science, technology, medicine, and social sciences. Modern laboratory and research centers allow students to partake in cutting-edge research projects.

Convenient Campus Amenities

KazNU offers diverse amenities, such as hostels, libraries, sports complexes, and study places, completing the academic needs of students with all necessary facilities for successful studying at KazNU.

Promising Career Opportunities

KazNU students and graduates easily obtain jobs due to KazNU’s reputation and partners in other countries of the world. Alumni work for prominent international corporations and organizations.

Lively Student Life

The university has a wide range of extracurricular activities which include cultural activities, sports, and student societies to enhance personal and social growth for students.

With its combination of good educational standards, inexpensive fees, and a plethora of stimulating activities, KazNU is the perfect institution to consider in Central Asia.

Placement At Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU) has a placement success record which successfully places its graduates. The university’s educational programs are of high standards, and its students are well equipped with marketable skills.

Multiple Job Vacancies

KazNU graduates are employed in the top private sector firms, government departments, research entities and even foreign organizations. A good number of alumni have also been employed with international companies such as Google, Microsoft, IBM, and others.

Business Initiatives

The University has insolventable stimulating and motivational policies for students which led some graduates to open their own firms several years after graduating.

Placement Services

KazNU has placed students in various organizations by offering career counseling services, organizing internships, job fairs, and networking occasions where students meet potential employers.

Alumni Relations

Global alumni network of the university constitutes a strong asset from which current students may benefit while seeking guidance and employment.

In light of all the factors mentioned, together with the reputation of KazNU, their established linkages with industries, and dedicated career services, the university’s graduates are able to find suitable employment and are able to progress in their careers.

Education Loan for Indian Students

Indian students wanting to enroll in international universities and colleges, including Al Farabi Kazakh National University, are entitled to an education loan which covers tuition and living expenses, Here are enticing pointers to note:

Loan Amount

All expenses, including travel, accommodation, and tuition fees, are included in education loans. Earning these loans is comparatively easier as banks do not require them to be backed by assets.

Banks with loan amounts less than ₹7.5 lakh do not require backing. However, It is possible that amounts larger than ₹7.5 lakh may require assets.

Documents Required

  • Proof of Identity and Address (Aadhaar, Passport, etc.)
  • Mark Sheets/Certificates
  • University Admission Letter
  • Income proof from parents (Either Salary Slips or IT Returns)
  • NEET Score (for Medical students)
  • Collateral asset documents
  • Interest Rates and Repayment

Bank specific, education loans range from 10-15% a year. In addition to this the amount also varies due to the scale of the loan.

The average repayment time is capped at 10 years, which is extended by the period earned in the moratorium.

Loan Sanction Process

State Bank of India, HDFC, ICICI, and Axis, along with the many other public and private banks, allow customers to apply directly for the loan.

The procedure for approving a loan consists of document submission, verification, and the sanctioning of the loan.

Our counselors at Atlas Mentor are well equipped to take you through the entire education loan process and ensure that all relevant documents and key information needed for obtaining the funding to study abroad is ready.

FAQs On Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU), Kazakhstan

Here are answers to some commonly asked questions about Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU) to help you better understand the university and its offerings:

What courses does Al Farabi Kazakh National University offer?

KazNU offers a wide range of programs at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels, including medicine (MBBS), engineering, science, humanities, and social sciences. The university also provides various research opportunities across these fields.

Is Al Farabi Kazakh National University recognized globally?

Yes, KazNU is globally recognized and has accreditations from major organizations such as the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Medical Council of India (MCI). This makes its degrees valid in many countries.

What is the medium of instruction at KazNU?

The primary language of instruction at Al Farabi Kazakh National University is English for most programs, including the MBBS course, making it suitable for international students.

Are scholarships available for international students?

Yes, KazNU offers scholarships and financial aid to eligible international students. These scholarships may cover partial or full tuition fees and are based on academic performance.

What are the hostel facilities like at KazNU?

KazNU provides comfortable and affordable hostel accommodation for international students. The hostels are well-maintained with facilities like reading rooms, dining areas, gyms, and computer labs for a convenient and supportive living experience.

These FAQs should help you get a clearer picture of life and studies at Al Farabi Kazakh National University (KazNU). If you have more questions, feel free to reach out!
